title: lagenocarpus humilis
intro: Lagenocarpus humilis, also known as the dwarf water fern or water screw fern, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the family Leptochoraceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Lagenocarpus humilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, fever, and skin conditions.
